sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2116" key="ai)/gagros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἴγαγρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen> and <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n2116.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the wild goat</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:102:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">102.8</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.71</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
